meta.title: (Previously) LIVE Hosting SpaceX OTV-5 (Secret Space Plane)
meta.description:
SpaceX is launching Boeing's secretive X-37B experimental spaceplane on top of their work horse Falcon 9 rocket. This is the 13th launch for SpaceX this year and 41st launch of the Falcon 9 overall. It will launch from pad 39A at Kennedy Space Center in Florida. After stage separation, they will be attempting a first stage landing back at the Cape Canaveral Air Force Base at LZ-1 (about 6 miles from the launch pad). 

Get your own Everyday Astronaut merch at http://everydayastronaut.com/shop

Show your support on Patreon - http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut
